## What changes / O que muda

Describe briefly what this PR does. / Descreva brevemente o que esse PR faz.

## Type of change / Tipo de mudança

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactoring

## Checklist

- [ ] I added an entry in the affected skill's `CHANGELOG.md`.
- [ ] I respected the closed C1-C8 vocabulary (if applicable to VibeShield).
- [ ] I respected the envelope format from `handoff-vibedev.md` (if applicable).
- [ ] I tested in Technical Mode and Layman Mode (if applicable).
- [ ] I read the [MANUAL.md](./MANUAL.md) and confirmed my change is aligned.

## How to test / Como testar

1. Command 1: ...
2. Expected: ...
3. Observed: ...

## Related issue / Issue relacionada

Fixes #N (if any).
